TypeChecker $B%*%V%8%'%/%H$O!"(B decorator pattern $B$K$h$C$F(B $B:9J,E*$K3HD%$9$k$3$H$,$G$-$^$9!#(B $B$=$l$K$O!"(B Epp $B$N(B extendTypeChecker $B%a%=%C%I$r;H$$$^$9!#(B decorator $B$+$i$O!"%$%s%9%?%s%9JQ?t(B orig $B$rDL$7$F!"(B $B%*%j%8%J%k$N(B TypeChecker $B%*%V%8%'%/%H$r8F$S=P$9$3$H$,$G$-$^$9!#(B extendTypeChecker $B$K$h$C$F3HD%$5$l$F$$$J$$;~$O!"JQ?t(B orig $B$NCM$O(B null $B$G$9!#(B

Tree $B$N:F5"E*$J7?%A%'%C%/$O!"%a%=%C%I(B typeCheckTree $B$K$h$C$F9T$J$o$l$^$9!#(B $B%a%=%C%I(B typeCheckTree $B$NF0:n$O!"87L)$K$O Symbol lastTag = null; while(true) { if (tree.isTyped()) break; Symbol tag = tree.tag(); if (tag == lastTag) break; lastTag = tag; TypeChecker func = (TypeChecker)typeCheckerTable.get(tag); if (func != null) { tree = func.call(tree); } else { throw error("TypeCheker for "+ tag+ " is not defined."); } } return tree; $B$9$J$o$A!"(B tree $B$N(B tag $B$KBP1~$9$k(B TypeChecker $B%*%V%8%'%/%H$N(B $B%a%=%C%I(B call $B$r8F$S=P$7!"JVCM$N(B tag $B$H!"8F$S=P$9A0$N(B tag $B$,(B $BEy$7$1$l$P!"%k!<%W$rH4$1$FJVCM$rJV$7$^$9!#$=$&$G$J$1$l$P!"(B tag $B$,JQ$o$i$J$/$J$k$^$G(B TypeChecker $B$K$h$kJQ49$r7+$jJV$7$^$9!#(B

See Also:
